stemHtml: State the main objectives for altimeter setting procedures.

options.a: The main reason is to provide vertical separation in the departure and landing phases only.
options.b: The main reason is to provide vertical separation between aircraft and terrain clearance during departure and landing phases only.
options.c: The main reason is to provide vertical separation between aircraft and input to ground-based SSR equipment.
options.d: The main reason is to provide vertical separation between aircraft and terrain clearance during all phases.
